templateMeta.name: VSR CRUD Integration Test
templateMeta.description: Test CRUD operations for ventures and services registry via MCP tools. Verifies ventures_registry and services_registry meta-tools work in autonomous agent context.

invariants.condition: Complete this task DIRECTLY yourself. Do NOT use dispatch_new_job or dispatch_existing_job.
invariants.assessment: Verify the agent did NOT dispatch any child jobs and performed all operations directly.

invariants.condition: Create a test venture using venture_mint with name 'VSR Test Venture', a valid owner address (use 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000001), and a blueprint with at least one invariant.
invariants.assessment: Verify venture_mint was called and returned a venture ID.

invariants.condition: Query the created venture using venture_query to verify it was created correctly. Check that all fields match what was submitted.
invariants.assessment: Verify venture_query was called with the created venture ID and returned the correct data.

do: Call venture_query with the venture ID

invariants.condition: Update the venture using venture_update to change its description to 'Updated by VSR CRUD test'.
invariants.assessment: Verify venture_update was called and the description was changed.

invariants.condition: Create a test service using service_registry with action 'create_service', linked to the venture you created. Name it 'VSR Test Service'.
invariants.assessment: Verify service_registry was called with create_service action and returned a service ID.

invariants.condition: Query the created service using service_registry with action 'get_service' or 'list_services' to verify it was created correctly.
invariants.assessment: Verify service_registry read action was called and returned the service data.

do: Call service_registry with get_service or list_services

invariants.condition: Update the service using service_registry with action 'update_service' to change its description to 'Updated by VSR CRUD test'.
invariants.assessment: Verify service_registry update action was called and description changed.

invariants.condition: Delete the test service using service_registry with action 'delete_service'.
Delete the test venture using venture_delete with mode 'hard' and confirm: true.

do: Call venture_delete with hard mode and confirm: true

invariants.condition: Create an artifact summarizing all CRUD test results with pass/fail status for each operation.
invariants.assessment: Verify create_artifact was called with a summary of test results.
